ry of flowering plants
9. Choose the given statement which is
suitable for following figure (Pg. 66, E)
SZ
+
A) It comprises of primary & secondary
root
B) Such roots are observed in mustard
C) These roots are replace by large
number root
D) A & B both
10. From given set of example choose, how
many of following are example of fibrous
root and adventitious root respectively.
Sweet potato, carrot, turnip, wheat, grass,
Monstera, banyan tree (Pg. 66, E)
A) 1,4 B) 1,3
C23 D) 3,2
11. Adventitious roots arise from- (Pg. 66, E)
A) Radicle
B) Base of stem in tuft as in wheat
C) Part of plant other than radicle as in
mustard
D) Secondary root
12. Root is characterized by (Pg. 66, E)
A) Presence of node & internode
B) Mainly (-ve) phototropism
C) Mainly (-ve) geotropism
D) Mainly (-ve) hydrotropism
13. Which of the following is not the main
function of root system is/are (Pg. 66, E)
A) Absorption of sap from soil
B) Providing proper anchorage to plant
parts.
C) Synthesis of plant growth regulators
D) None of these
14. Identify given diagram (Pg. 66, M)
